languages.text: Призваные Уралоном демоны получают +50% от Felowship уралона к их статам — WS,STR,AGI,TGH,PER,WILL.Демоны Уралона своими атаками по врагам, фармят ему Tactical Advantage стаки. +10% от нанесенного урона, 25% нанесенного урона при крите. Так же Уралон протектит свой сквад от Manifestation от всех демонов.

traits.locale_text: Призваные Уралоном демоны получают +50% от Felowship уралона к их статам — WS,STR,AGI,TGH,PER,WILL.Демоны Уралона своими атаками по врагам, фармят ему Tactical Advantage стаки. +10% от нанесенного урона, 25% нанесенного урона при крите. Так же Уралон протектит свой сквад от Manifestation от всех демонов.

languages.text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.
languages.original_text: Призваные Уралоном демоны получают +50% от Felowship уралона к их статам — WS,STR,AGI,TGH,PER,WILL.Демоны Уралона своими атаками по врагам, фармят ему Tactical Advantage стаки. +10% от нанесенного урона, 25% нанесенного урона при крите. Так же Уралон протектит свой сквад от Manifestation от всех демонов.

traits.locale_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains <u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or <u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

languages.text:
Все демоны, призванные Уралоном, получают бонус к Ближнему Бою, Силе, Ловкости, Выносливости, Восприятию и Воле, равный 50% Общительности Уралона. Каждый раз, когда призванный демон попадает по цели, Уралон получает +<u>(10% от урона, нанесенного демоном)</u> зарядов {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}тактического преимущества{/g} (или +<u>(25% от урона, нанесенного демоном)</u> зарядов {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}тактического преимущества{/g}, если попадание было критическим).
Союзники Уралона не страдают от {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Проявления{/g} любых демонов.
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

Союзники Уралона не страдают от {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Проявления{/g} любых демонов.

Все демоны, призванные Уралоном, получают бонус к Ближнему Бою, Силе, Ловкости, Выносливости, Восприятию и Воле, равный 50% Общительности Уралона. Каждый раз, когда призванный демон попадает по цели, Уралон получает +<u>(10% от урона, нанесенного демоном)</u> зарядов {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}тактического преимущества{/g} (или +<u>(25% от урона, нанесенного демоном)</u> зарядов {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}тактического преимущества{/g}, если попадание было критическим).
Союзники Уралона не страдают от {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Проявления{/g} любых демонов.

languages.text:
Tous les démons invoqués par Uralon gagnent un bonus à la Capacité de combat, à la Force, à l'Agilité, à l'Endurance, à la Perception et à la Force mentale égal à 50 % de sa Sociabilité. Lorsqu'un démon invoqué touche sa cible, Uralon gagne +<u>(10 % des dégâts infligés par le démon)</u> cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g} (ou +<u>25 % des dégâts infligés par le démon</u> cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g} dans le cas d'un coup critique).
Les alliés d'Uralon sont insensibles à la {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} des démons.
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

Tous les démons invoqués par Uralon gagnent un bonus à la Capacité de combat, à la Force, à l'Agilité, à l'Endurance, à la Perception et à la Force mentale égal à 50 % de sa Sociabilité. Lorsqu'un démon invoqué touche sa cible, Uralon gagne +<u>(10 % des dégâts infligés par le démon)</u> cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g} (ou +<u>25 % des dégâts infligés par le démon</u> cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g} dans le cas d'un coup critique).
Les alliés d'Uralon sont insensibles à la {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} des démons.

languages.text:
Uralon'un çağırdığı tüm iblisler; Silah Yeteneği, Kuvvet, Çeviklik, Dayanıklılık, Algı ve İrade niteliklerine Uralon'un Sosyallik niteliğinin %50'si kadar bonus kazanır. Uralon, çağrılan bir iblis vurduğunda <u>(iblisin verdiği hasarın %10'u)</u> kadar {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}taktiksel avantaj{/g} birikimi (veya iblis, kritik vuruş gerçekleştirirse +<u>(iblisin verdiği hasarın %25'i)</u> kadar {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}taktiksel avantaj{/g} birikimi) kazanır.
Uralon'un dost birimleri, hiçbir iblisin {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Tezahür{/g} kabiliyetinden etkilenmez.
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

traits.locale_text:
Uralon'un çağırdığı tüm iblisler; Silah Yeteneği, Kuvvet, Çeviklik, Dayanıklılık, Algı ve İrade niteliklerine Uralon'un Sosyallik niteliğinin %50'si kadar bonus kazanır. Uralon, çağrılan bir iblis vurduğunda <u>(iblisin verdiği hasarın %10'u)</u> kadar {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}taktiksel avantaj{/g} birikimi (veya iblis, kritik vuruş gerçekleştirirse +<u>(iblisin verdiği hasarın %25'i)</u> kadar {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}taktiksel avantaj{/g} birikimi) kazanır.
Uralon'un dost birimleri, hiçbir iblisin {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Tezahür{/g} kabiliyetinden etkilenmez.

languages.text:
乌拉隆召唤的所有恶魔获得等同于乌拉隆社交属性50%的武器技能、力量、敏捷、坚韧、感知和意志加值。召唤出的恶魔每次命中时，乌拉隆获得<u>（恶魔造成伤害的10%）</u>层{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}战术优势{/g}（若恶魔造成暴击，则获得<u>（恶魔造成伤害的25%）</u>层{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}战术优势{/g}）。
乌拉隆的盟友不受任何恶魔{g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}显化{/g}效果影响。
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

乌拉隆的盟友不受任何恶魔{g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}显化{/g}效果影响。

languages.text:
Todos los daemons invocados por Uralon reciben una bonificación a la Habilidad de armas, Fuerza, Agilidad, Resistencia, Percepción y Voluntad igual al 50 % de la Empatía de Uralon. Cada vez que un daemon invocado golpea a un enemigo, Uralon recibe +<u>(10 % del daño infligido por el daemon)</u> acumulaciones de {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}ventaja táctica{/g} (o +<u>(25 % del daño infligido por el daemon)</u> acumulaciones de {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}ventaja táctica{/g}, si el daemon asesta un impacto crítico).
Los aliados de Uralon no sufren ninguna {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestación{/g} de daemons.
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

traits.locale_text:
Todos los daemons invocados por Uralon reciben una bonificación a la Habilidad de armas, Fuerza, Agilidad, Resistencia, Percepción y Voluntad igual al 50 % de la Empatía de Uralon. Cada vez que un daemon invocado golpea a un enemigo, Uralon recibe +<u>(10 % del daño infligido por el daemon)</u> acumulaciones de {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}ventaja táctica{/g} (o +<u>(25 % del daño infligido por el daemon)</u> acumulaciones de {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}ventaja táctica{/g}, si el daemon asesta un impacto crítico).
Los aliados de Uralon no sufren ninguna {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestación{/g} de daemons.

languages.text:
Alle von Uralon gerufenen Dämonen erhalten einen Bonus auf Waffenfähigkeit, Stärke, Beweglichkeit, Zähigkeit, Wahrnehmung und Willenskraft in Höhe von 50 % von Uralons Gefolgschaft-Eigenschaft. Erzielt ein gerufener Dämon einen Treffer, erhält Uralon +<u>(10 % Schaden des Dämons)</u> Stapel {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Taktischer Vorteil{/g} (oder +<u>(25 % des Schadens des Dämons)</u> Stapel {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Taktischer Vorteil{/g}, wenn der Dämon einen kritischen Treffer erzielt).
Uralons Verbündete werden durch die {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} von Dämonen nicht beeinflusst.
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.

traits.locale_text:
Alle von Uralon gerufenen Dämonen erhalten einen Bonus auf Waffenfähigkeit, Stärke, Beweglichkeit, Zähigkeit, Wahrnehmung und Willenskraft in Höhe von 50 % von Uralons Gefolgschaft-Eigenschaft. Erzielt ein gerufener Dämon einen Treffer, erhält Uralon +<u>(10 % Schaden des Dämons)</u> Stapel {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Taktischer Vorteil{/g} (oder +<u>(25 % des Schadens des Dämons)</u> Stapel {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Taktischer Vorteil{/g}, wenn der Dämon einen kritischen Treffer erzielt).
Uralons Verbündete werden durch die {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} von Dämonen nicht beeinflusst.

languages.text:
ウラロンが召喚したすべてのデーモンは、ウラロンの統率力能力値の50%に等しい近接技能、筋力、敏捷、耐久力、知覚、意志力へのボーナスを得る。召喚されたデーモンが命中するたびに、ウラロンは{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}戦術的優位{/g}を+<u>(デーモンが与えたダメージの10%)</u>スタック得る（デーモンがクリティカルヒットを出した場合は{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}戦術的優位{/g}を+<u>(デーモンが与えたダメージの25%)</u>スタック）。
ウラロンの味方は、いかなるデーモンの{g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}顕現{/g}の影響も受けない。
languages.original_text:
All daemons summoned by Uralon gain a bonus to Weapon Skill, Strength, Agility, Toughness, Perception, Willpower equal to 50% of Uralon's Fellowship characteristic. Whenever a summoned daemon hits, Uralon gains +<u>(10% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g} (or +<u>(25% of damage dealt by the daemon)</u> stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}, if the daemon scores a critical hit).
Uralon's allies do not suffer from {g|f:9f073e3858ab46dc90e16957a3081e78}Manifestation{/g} of any daemons.
